creator: n@nectar.com
text:
On Wed, Feb 21, 2001 at 02:34:39PM +0100, Jan Conrad wrote:

> 
> I suggested that 'make install' should change

> accordingly

Sorry ... not enough coffee yet this morning.  I was thrown by the
synopsis -- I guess you meant `absolute path'.  I'll reopen your PR.

Cheers,

Jacques Vidrine / n@nectar.com / jvidrine@verio.net / nectar@FreeBSD.org
